title: psilogramme incisa
side_effects: Psilogramme incisa can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset. In rare cases, it may also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues. Prolonged or excessive use of this plant can lead to headaches, fatigue, and decreased cognitive function. If not used under the guidance of a qualified practitioner, psilogramme incisa can potentially interact with other medications, exacerbating existing health conditions.
